title: mimulus subulatus
intro: Mimulus subulatus, also known as monkey flower, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Mimulus subulatus include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Mimulus subulatus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
